description: Close accountable human evidence, mapping, source-rights and dashboard review gates.

gates.evidence: Both isolated reviewers completed all 1,500 frozen cases. The canonical ledger contains 3,000 records with 894 agreements and 606 disagreements; accountable adjudication and one-time holdout evaluation remain pending.
The current checksum-bound ledger validates 191 approved decisions. CMS/MBS/PBS restrictions remain explicit; Apache-2.0 applies only to project code and metadata.

The commit-bound automated packet covers 44 browser tests and 36 screenshot hashes against commit 591d84a1b5c4dd7d703414562c1fe2082dd7ef32; scoped accountable human review remains pending and automated evidence is not universal WCAG certification.
